name: Chicken Breasts Over Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 can cream of mushroom soup, light
4 each chicken breast halves without skin
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve half a bouillon cube in 1 1/2 cups hot water, and use to make instant rice. Set aside.
2. In a medium bowl (2 cup measuring cup works perfectly), mix mushroom soup, 1 can warm water, onion soup mix, celery salt, and garlic salt. Let stand for 10 minutes.
3. Stir one-third of the soup mixture into the rice. Spray a 9-inch square glass baking dish with non-stick cooking spray and spread the rice in the bottom. Spread another quarter cup of soupmixture over the top. Arrange chicken breasts on top of the rice. Spoon the remaining soup mixture over the chicken, making sure to completely cover each piece.
4. Bake at 375°F for 40 minutes.
